title: Higher vote share for Vijay could work to the DMK’s advantage, says the CPI Tamil Nadu secretary
description: Within the TVK, there is an educated group of people keen on defeating the BJP front which, they believe, is acting against Tamil Nadu’s interests. Many of them recognise that voting for Vijay may not yield benefits. They understand that the DMK-led alliance has an edge over the AIADMK-led front, says M. Veerapandian
